entities.name: ASPIRATIONS
entities.description: Reference points for individuals' forward-looking decisions and behaviours, analyzed in the context of poverty dynamics

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of being extremely poor, whose dynamics are analyzed in relation to aspirations

entities.name: FINANCIAL LITERACY
entities.description: The ability to understand and effectively use various financial skills, found to have a positive correlation with aspirations

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: The country where the study on households was conducted

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Programs designed to raise aspirations and improve socio-economic conditions

entities.name: NON-COGNITIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of individuals that are not related to cognitive ability, used as control variables in the analysis

entities.name: SENSITIVITY ANALYSES
entities.description: Statistical methods used to test the robustness of results against omitted variables

entities.name: FORWARD-LOOKING BEHAVIOUR
entities.description: Decisions and actions based on future expectations, influenced by aspirations

relationships.description: Positive correlation between financial literacy and aspirations
